How to Start Earning with U7777 in Pakistan

Getting started takes less than 10 minutes. Follow these three steps and you will be playing with your 50% welcome bonus right away.

1

Download the U7777 APK

Click the Download APK button on this page to get the latest official U7777 app. Since it is not on Google Play Store, you install it directly — we walk you through it step by step.

Full Download Guide →
2

Create Your Account

Registration takes 2 minutes. Enter your phone number, set a password, verify with OTP, and your account is ready. New accounts automatically get the 50% welcome bonus on first deposit.

Registration Guide →
3

Deposit via JazzCash or EasyPaisa

Add as little as PKR 100 to your wallet using JazzCash or EasyPaisa. Your balance updates instantly. Then pick any game and start playing.

Deposit Guide →

Deposit PKR 100 and play with PKR 150. Deposit PKR 1000 and play with PKR 1500. Claimed automatically on your first deposit.

Top Games on U7777 Pakistan

Over 500 games in one app. Here are the most popular ones Pakistani players love.

🃏

Teen Patti

The most popular card game in Pakistan. Fast rounds, simple rules, and big wins. Perfect if you enjoy traditional card games with a competitive twist.

🐉

Dragon Tiger

Pick Dragon or Tiger, place your bet, and win in seconds. The fastest casino game on U7777 — ideal for quick sessions between breaks.

🎰

Slot Games

Over 200 slot machines from top providers like JILI and FunTa. Spin and win with jackpots that can multiply your stake many times over.

🎣

Fishing Games

Shoot fish to earn coins. Colourful, fast-paced, and very popular among Pakistani players. Great for casual sessions.

♟️

Ludo King

The classic board game you grew up playing, now with real money stakes. Challenge other players online and earn real PKR.

🏏

Sports Betting

Bet on cricket, football, and more. Live odds and real-time updates for PSL and international matches.

View All 500+ Games

Why Pakistani Players Choose U7777

There are dozens of earning apps in Pakistan. Here is what makes U7777 different.

⚡

Instant JazzCash Withdrawals

Withdraw your winnings directly to your JazzCash or EasyPaisa wallet. Most withdrawals complete within minutes.

🔒

Secure and Encrypted

Your money and personal data are protected with bank-level encryption. All transactions go through secure payment gateways with OTP verification.

🎁

50% Welcome Bonus

New players get a guaranteed 50% bonus on their first deposit. Plus daily bonuses, referral rewards, and VIP loyalty rewards.

📱

Works on Any Android

The U7777 APK is lightweight and runs smoothly even on budget Android phones. If your phone runs WhatsApp, it runs U7777.

🇵🇰

Built for Pakistan

Urdu language support, local payment methods, Pakistani sports betting, and games popular in Pakistan like Teen Patti and Ludo.

🎮

500+ Games

From classic card games to live dealer tables to crash games and sports betting — more variety than any other earning app in Pakistan.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about U7777 Game in Pakistan.

How do I download U7777 Game in Pakistan?+
Click the Download APK button on this page. Go to Settings, enable Unknown Sources, open the downloaded file and install. Takes under 5 minutes.
Can I deposit via JazzCash in U7777?+
Yes. JazzCash is the most popular deposit method. Minimum deposit is PKR 100. Go to Wallet, tap Deposit, select JazzCash, send money and enter Transaction ID.
What is the U7777 welcome bonus?+
New players get 50% extra on their first deposit. Deposit PKR 100 and get PKR 50 free. Deposit PKR 1000 and get PKR 500 free. Credited automatically.
How long does withdrawal take?+
JazzCash and EasyPaisa withdrawals complete within 5-10 minutes. Minimum withdrawal amount is PKR 310.
Is U7777 safe to use in Pakistan?+
U7777 uses encrypted transactions and OTP verification. Always download from official website u7777.net.pk to avoid fake versions.
What games are available on U7777?+
U7777 has 500+ games including slots, Teen Patti, Dragon Tiger, Ludo, fishing games, Rummy, Aviator, and live sports betting on cricket and football.
